data.title: Canada Appoints New Chief Trade Negotiator for U.S. Relations
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has appointed an experienced public servant as the country's new chief trade negotiator with the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of this appointment in strengthening trade relations between the two nations. The decision comes amid ongoing discussions and negotiations on various trade agreements and policies. The newly appointed negotiator is expected to play a crucial role in advancing Canada's trade interests and ensuring favorable outcomes in future negotiations with the U.S.

data.title: GEOPOLITICS | Ukraine Focuses on Military and Diplomatic Efforts Amid Russian Threats
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky stated that Ukraine is currently concentrating on both military preparations and diplomatic efforts. According to Jin10, Zelensky warned that Russia is preparing to launch further large-scale attacks on the energy sector. He emphasized the need for well-configured air defense systems and timely support from partners. Zelensky specifically highlighted the necessity for international partners, particularly the United States, to remain engaged and take action to compel Russia towards peace. Despite Ukraine accepting all practical proposals from the U.S., including a ceasefire, Russian attacks on cities and energy infrastructure continue.

data.title: SpaceX and xAI Compete in Pentagon Drone Technology Contest
data.description: Elon Musk's companies, SpaceX and its subsidiary xAI, are participating in a confidential Pentagon competition to develop voice-controlled, autonomous drone swarming technology, according to sources familiar with the situation. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the involvement of these companies in the defense sector's latest technological advancements. The contest aims to enhance military capabilities through innovative drone technology, reflecting the growing interest in autonomous systems within defense strategies. The competition underscores the increasing collaboration between private tech firms and government agencies in advancing military technology.

data.title: A New EU License Puts OKX in a Different Regulatory League
data.description:
OKX has secured a Payments Institution license in Malta, positioning the exchange to operate under the European Union’s MiCA and PSD2 regulatory frameworks. The company confirmed the approval through its official channels. Stating the license enables it to expand compliant stablecoin and digital asset payment services across the EU
source: https://techgaged.com/a-new-eu-license-puts-okx-in-a-different-regulatory-league/

data.title: Euro Stablecoins Could Aid International Transfers, ECB Official Suggests
data.description: Euro-denominated stablecoins have the potential to facilitate cost-effective international transfers, according to Joachim Nagel, a member of the European Central Bank's Governing Council. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Nagel's remarks on the role these digital currencies could play in complementing the ECB's efforts to develop a digital euro. Nagel emphasized that stablecoins could serve as a useful tool in the financial ecosystem, particularly in enhancing cross-border transactions. His comments come amid ongoing discussions about the future of digital currencies in Europe and the ECB's plans to introduce a digital version of the euro. The integration of stablecoins into the financial system could provide additional benefits, such as reducing transaction costs and increasing efficiency in international payments. As the ECB continues to explore the potential of a digital euro, the role of stablecoins remains a significant consideration in shaping the future of digital finance in the region.

data.title: World Bank President Ajay Banga Focuses on Job Creation in Emerging Markets
data.description: World Bank President Ajay Banga aims to establish a legacy centered on generating employment opportunities for young individuals in emerging markets. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Banga's commitment to addressing economic challenges faced by Generation Z. This demographic is experiencing unprecedented levels on the Misery Index, which combines inflation and unemployment rates. Banga's focus on job creation seeks to alleviate these economic pressures and foster growth in developing regions.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Criticizes Gateway Project for Potential Cost Overruns
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump expressed strong opposition to the Gateway project in New York/New Jersey through a social media post. According to Jin10, Trump criticized the project as a future 'money pit,' predicting it would exceed estimated costs by billions of dollars. He compared it to California Governor Gavin Newsom's 'railroad to nowhere,' which he claimed has already exceeded its budget multiple times and threatens California's economy. Trump warned that without immediate and rigorous planning, the Gateway project could lead to a financial disaster for the region. He emphasized that the federal government would not cover any cost overruns but is willing to engage in negotiations to prevent such issues.

data.title: Tokenized Real-World Assets Show Resilience Amid Cryptocurrency Market Turmoil
data.description:
Demand for tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) has shown significant growth over the past month, despite the broader cryptocurrency markets experiencing substantial selling pressure. According to Cointelegraph, this trend highlights the sector's resilience and its expanding institutional presence.

Data from RWA.xyz indicates that the total value of onchain RWAs increased by 13.5% over the past 30 days. This growth is attributed to higher asset issuance, with more tokenized securities being introduced to public blockchains, and an increase in the number of unique wallet addresses holding these assets, suggesting a rise in participation. As of February 16, major blockchain networks tracked by RWA.xyz, including Ethereum, Arbitrum, and Solana, recorded significant increases in tokenized asset value, with Ethereum leading at approximately $1.7 billion in net growth, followed by Arbitrum at $880 million and Solana at $530 million.

Excluding stablecoins, the net growth in tokenized securities such as Treasurys, private credit, and other yield-bearing instruments has accelerated over the past 30 days. Tokenized US Treasurys and government debt remain the largest RWA category, with over $10 billion in outstanding onchain products. Flows into these instruments continued during the period, while tokenized stocks and exchange-traded products also posted gains.

The steady demand for tokenized RWAs indicates deeper institutional participation, as asset managers increasingly utilize public blockchains to issue and settle tokenized versions of traditional financial products. Tokenized money market funds are evolving beyond simple yield vehicles and are beginning to serve as collateral in certain trading and lending markets. Major institutions, including BlackRock, JPMorgan, and Goldman Sachs, have become active participants in this space. BlackRock recently made its first formal move into decentralized finance by introducing its USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) tokenized US Treasury fund to Uniswap.

This growth contrasts sharply with the broader cryptocurrency market, which has lost approximately $1 trillion in market value over the past month, underscoring the relative stability of yield-bearing tokenized assets. The total crypto market has continued to unravel since October, with losses intensifying in January. Derivatives markets have been a key source of stress, with a large-scale deleveraging event in October triggering broader weakness across digital assets. Conditions have yet to fully recover, and sentiment remains fragile even as equities continue trading near record highs.

data.title: SBI Holdings CEO Denies $10B XRP Holdings
data.description:
SBI Holdings’ Chairman and CEO Yoshitaka Kitao publicly rejected circulating claims that the Japanese financial group holds approximately $10 billion in XRP tokens, clarifying that the company does not own those tokens directly and instead holds an equity stake in Ripple Labs. com.
source: https://techgaged.com/sbi-holdings-ceo-denies-10b-xrp-holdings/

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Suggests Prediction Markets as Stablecoin Alternative
data.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has proposed that prediction markets could provide price stability akin to stablecoins, potentially reducing reliance on fiat currency. According to NS3.AI, Buterin envisions a system where users can hedge future expenses through personalized prediction market shares, offering a sustainable alternative to traditional money. Industry leaders support this view, seeing prediction markets as evolving from entertainment to essential economic information infrastructure.

data.title: Germany Considers Age Restrictions on Social Media Amid Tensions with Trump
data.description: Germany is considering implementing age restrictions on social media platforms, a decision that could heighten tensions with U.S. President Donald Trump. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the potential for increased friction between the two nations. The proposed regulations aim to protect younger users from harmful content and ensure safer online environments. This move aligns with broader European efforts to regulate digital platforms and enhance user safety. The introduction of such measures may lead to diplomatic discussions, as the U.S. administration has previously expressed concerns over European digital policies impacting American tech companies. The outcome of Germany's decision could influence similar regulatory actions across Europe.
